mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.user_name AS user_name, u.oa_account AS oa_account, u.org_id AS org_id, o.org_path AS org_path, u.password_hash AS password_hash, u.account_status AS account_status FROM szzw.t_yqyc_sys_user u LEFT JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_org o ON u.org_id = o.id WHERE u.oa_account = #{oaAccount} AND u.account_status = '正常'

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.user_name AS user_name, u.oa_account AS oa_account, u.org_id AS org_id, o.org_path AS org_path, u.password_hash AS password_hash, u.account_status AS account_status FROM szzw.t_yqyc_sys_user u LEFT JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_org o ON u.org_id = o.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.account_status = '正常'
